video_title: How to make the best use of the course
full_transcript: Welcome everyone, we are going to talk about this in this video, since this is your initial week, you have just started the course, what do you do to get maximum advantage of this course? Let's start, I believe that this course is not very good, but you have invested a lot of money in this course, and you are spending a lot of time on this course, so you should invest your time here If I talk about the time, it is not wrong to say that you have invested a lot of money in this course, and if you have invested so much in your career, then I strongly believe that if you have invested your time or money, then this is your moral responsibility If you are not doing it, then it will not be wrong to say that you have invested this course, but you did not take advantage of this course So what will we do to get 100x advantage of this course? The first thing I would like you to do is to use everything that is offering you If you want to get a recording, then watch all the recordings carefully, follow live sessions, do all the assignments and give all the tests You should not miss one of these things, I will say that you should not miss all the live doubt sessions, because it is possible that you can learn from the perspective of the other people who are asking about doubts So you keep asking questions to the other person and you understand his solution, then you get a different perspective of thinking from that So you have to do all the recording contents, watch live, watch assignments, do the tests, because you have faith in this course, so you should do all these things You will do these things only then you will be able to take advantage of it So this is the first thing, the second thing I say to every student is that you do not have to be serious, you need a little sincerity Sinsality means that you have to be consistent, if you have less time, then give less time, but give your time to learn this course every day so that you can learn it incrementally I believe that learning programming and coding is exactly the same as learning to go to the gym For example, if you work hard for a day and then do not go for the next 10 days and then follow this pattern every 10 days, you go once and work hard If you keep doing this for years, then there will be no difference in your physique But in return, if you do gym every day for the next 3 months, you will see that your personality has changed completely Same thing is in the world of programming, you will be able to take advantage of it with the course and with the help of the course So this is your sincerity And the third important thing here is that you should not look at it like Netflix, you should not look at it like Amazon Prime Whenever you are watching recorded content or live, you should try to repeat it again You should write somewhere and pause the video, come back to it in your mind Because unless you do your own things, no matter what you try to do, it will not give you much advantage So what do you have to do? You have to do it yourself If you have done this, trust me, you will get more benefits from this course. And last but not the least, I want you to join this course with an open mind. You will get many mentors, subject matter experts, and you should try to learn from everyone. Because when you learn from multiple people, you have a unique opportunity to motivate them and learn from them. And make yourself a better software engineer. If you get only one mentor, you will learn from one mentor. But we will try to provide you with the best mentors of the industry, so that you can understand everyone's perspective. And you will get more benefits if you are open for everyone. So respect every mentor who is going to teach you on this platform. And if you do all these things, I promise you that I will make sure that your investment is 100x.
